title: aeschynanthus arctocalyx
intro: Aeschynanthus arctocalyx, also known as the 'Moon Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriad family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus arctocalyx are said to include reducing fever, improving digestion, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Aeschynanthus arctocalyx are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
